name: LV_002_CLCARD
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[LV_002_CLCARD] AS
SELECT
      LGMAIN.*, '' AS WFLOWCRD
FROM
      LG_002_CLCARD LGMAIN WITH(NOLOCK)
WHERE
      (LGMAIN.CARDTYPE <> 22)
